overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person driving perspective through Los Santos. The player navigates a yellow vehicle along palm-tree lined commercial streets, passing a recycling truck and turning at intersections in bright sunny conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale shopping boulevard with palm tree median

events.description: steering left to begin overtaking the recycling truck

agents.ego_description: driving behind a white sedan and alongside a recycling truck, preparing to pass on the left

notable_agents.action: large green recycling truck moving slowly in the right lane, blocking traffic
white sedan driving ahead in the center lane

entered.detail: large green garbage truck with recycling logo and 'Since 1979' text on the side
row of tall palm trees lining the center boulevard
white commercial buildings with green awnings and storefronts
tall abstract modern sculpture visible in the distance at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sunlit palm-tree lined boulevard in an upscale commercial district. A large green recycling truck occupies the right lane ahead, while the camera vehicle prepares to overtake. The iconic Vinewood statue is visible in the distance at the approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with modern sculpture and crosswalks

events.description: completing the pass of the recycling truck on the left
entering the open intersection with the Vinewood statue becoming prominent on the left
continuing straight through the intersection toward the next cross street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection after passing the truck, maintaining a straight trajectory

notable_agents.action: dark SUV crossing the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: concrete pedestal of the sculpture with a no u-turn sign attached
zebra crossing markings painted on the asphalt
high-rise building with dark horizontal stripes and modern glass facade
commercial building with large 'Marquees' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: Having passed the recycling truck, the vehicle enters a wide sunlit intersection dominated by the Vinewood statue on the left. The camera crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk and continues straight, with modern office buildings rising on the right and commercial structures on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with high-end retail and office buildings

events.description: slowing down and signaling to prepare for a right turn at the intersection
stopping at the stop sign then executing a right turn onto the new street
accelerating to follow the black sedan ahead down the new street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and following a black sedan down the commercial street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead that the ego vehicle is following closely
large white Big Goods delivery truck parked at the corner near the stop sign

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the corner intersection
white semi-truck with orange 'Big Goods' logo and branding
upscale clothing retailer with black signage and white lettering
circular modern architecture building with white structural columns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows and executes a right turn at the intersection, passing a stop sign and a parked delivery truck. Now driving down a new commercial street, the camera follows a black sedan past high-end retail stores including Ponsonby's, with modern office buildings and parked cars lining both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective through a sunlit commercial district that shifts from a wide boulevard to a dense retail street. It begins by cruising along a palm-tree lined road, trailing a large green recycling truck while the Vinewood statue looms in the distance. As the vehicle overtakes the truck, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses a zebra-striped crosswalk beneath the shadow of the statue and surrounding office buildings. The vehicle then slows to execute a right turn past a stop sign and a parked delivery truck, transitioning the view toward a new commercial corridor. Finally, the camera follows a black sedan past high-end retail stores like Ponsonby's, with modern architecture and parked cars lining both sides of the road.
